subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Yesterday a detailed letter was written unto thee; now this recent letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان دیروز مکتوب بسیار مفصل بشما مرقوم گردید حال مکتوب اخیر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
